description: RAG application — knowledgebase-powered search and answers
roadmap:
1. Define your document corpus
2. Ingest and verify with /status
3. Test retrieval quality with /eval
4. Tune search weights and chunk sizes
5. Build the query interface (API, UI, or chatbot)
6. Add conversation history if multi-turn
7. Monitor with Grafana dashboards
8. Export stack for production
